raw.question: Made generated operation wording adapter-neutral
raw.reasoning: PR feedback showed provider-specific filename examples were leaking into GitHub, Pipedrive, Salesforce, and Notion sidecar docs; fixing the generator prevents drift across all adapters.

retrospective.summary: Addressed PR 104 review feedback by making generated writeback Operations guidance adapter-neutral, regenerating adapter discovery docs, and validating discovery plus Jira tests/typecheck.
